name: Rodrigo Kahale | DANGEROUS FWB
description:
OC ★ RODRIGO

You two are nothing, so why does he care about you?

─────────────────────────────

─────────────────────────────

◆ Rodrigo always moved solo, preferring one night stands to a serious relationship, and that's where you come in, his new toy. However, he may worry more than he should about you and try to take care of you roughly in his own way. ☆

◆ tw: established relationship (yall fuck:p), manipulation, control dynamics and power imbalance, mention of drugs and weapons, dead dove, any pov, he's kinda fluff if u squint. 🦦

☆ paid request for mimi! Rodrigo is a remake of my old husband series (specifically Eros White, lmao) he was given a name and design change, plus it's clearly set to his slightly younger version. I will not delete Eros.

★ psst, i have a dc server with Rosie if u wanna join!
